data_description.esphome_device_id: Select the ESPHome device that hosts your fingerprint reader. The service name and event prefix will be filled in automatically on the next screen.
data_description.sensor_entity_id: Optional: sensor entity that shows the last matched finger ID. Only needed if you do not use an event prefix.

configure.title: Confirm ESPHome settings
configure.description: These values are derived from the selected device. Adjust them only if your ESPHome YAML uses a different naming convention.

data_description.event_prefix: The common prefix of all homeassistant.event calls in your ESPHome YAML, e.g. 'esphome.garage_fingerprint'.
data_description.esphome_device: Device name as used in HA services (hyphens replaced by underscores), e.g. 'esphome_garage_fingerprint'.

error.entity_not_found: The selected sensor entity was not found. Make sure the ESPHome device is online.
